title: Split bundled _set methods into separate _create/_destroy
description: custom_emoji_set, space_ban_set, and space_invite_set each take both a create input AND a destroy list, forcing callers to supply both even when they only want one. Every other resource (chat, message, space) has separate _create and _destroy methods. Split these three into custom_emoji_create/custom_emoji_destroy, space_ban_create/space_ban_destroy, space_invite_create/space_invite_destroy for consistency.
